title: sphenodesme pentandra var. wallichiana
intro: Sphenodesme pentandra var. wallichiana, also known as Himalayan sphenodesme, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Himalayan sphenodesme include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
